{{Quote|Blast it, Gerdy! I told you not to use priority frequencies to call that female on Aduba-4!|An Imperial [[Major/Legends|Major]], to Gerdy|<ref name="marvel60">[[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' (1977) 60]]</ref>}}
'''Aduba-4''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Aduba system/Legends|Aduba system]],<ref name="g4" /> located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Bheriz sector/Legends|Bheriz sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The fourth planet in its system, Aduba-4 had a pair of [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. The neighbor of the notorious [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]],<ref name="g4" /> Aduba-4 had a population of its own during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], including a woman who was in a relationship with an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial officer|officer]] named [[Gerdy]].<ref name="marvel60" />
